facts.title: Org announcement — welcome Jared Hale
constraints: Use only the facts listed in this fact sheet.
Do not invent people, customers, vendors, prices, dates, or amounts.
State every required_mentions fact; dates and amounts may use natural formats.
Write as an in-world company artifact, not as a story summary.
facts.business_context: The First Route Nadia Carr needed a reliable way to protect service quality when a repair or installation produced a callback, and Jared Hale supplied the field perspective needed to make the process practical.
